---
title: "Projects"
---

A selection of personal work at the intersection of finance, data, and building useful things. (Course assignments are intentionally excluded.)

## Buying High: 143 Years of S&P 500 Valuation

Does the price you pay today tell you anything about the return you get later? An analysis of Shiller CAPE history against subsequent ten-year real total returns, plus a sector-level valuation cross-section of today's index.

**Tools:** R, tidyverse, ggplot2, Quarto
[Read the analysis →](sp500-valuation.qmd)

## Venezuela Human Development Map

An interactive choropleth of HDI across Venezuela's federal entities, built in R with Leaflet using public census and development data. Motivated by wanting a clearer picture of regional inequality in my home country.

**Tools:** R, Leaflet, tidyverse, Quarto
[View project →](#) *(link your repo or rendered page here)*

## Para Mi Amor — Spanish Learning App

A Duolingo-style interactive web app I designed and built from scratch as a gift — custom lessons, progress tracking, and gamified review. A fun exercise in product thinking, UX, and front-end logic.

**Tools:** HTML/CSS/JavaScript, React
[View project →](#)

## Bloomberg Sector Analysis: U.S. Utilities

Independent deep-dive on NextEra Energy and the utilities sector using Bloomberg Terminal — comparable-company analysis, beta and analyst-recommendation screens, relative valuation (EQRV), and market-concentration (HHI) work.

**Tools:** Bloomberg Terminal, Excel
[Read the write-up →](#)

---

*More coming: I'm currently building out additional markets and data projects. Check back soon or find me on [GitHub](https://github.com/soyaxelmartinez).*
